settings.showTempValue.desc: Display the current degrees alongside the condition.
settings.showTempValue.label: Show temperature value
settings.showTempUnit.desc: Show °C or °F indicating the temperature unit when using a horizontal bar.
settings.showTempUnit.label: Show temperature unit when horizontal
settings.showConditionIcon.desc: Include the visual weather symbol in the widget.
settings.showConditionIcon.label: Show condition icon
settings.tooltipOption.desc: Choose what you would like the tooltip to display.
settings.tooltipOption.label: Tooltip options
settings.customColor.desc: Choose what color you would like the icon and text to be.
settings.customColor.label: Custom color
